item.title: Hooked on Flavor: Addiction, Present Bias, and the Consequences of E-Cigarette Flavor Policy
item.description: <!-- This work is largely driven by the results in my [previous paper](/publication/When_Asymmetric_Pricing_Algorithms_Collide/) on algorithmic pricing fixing. -->
